title: Horsfieldia crassifolia

The genus Horsfieldia is part of the larger order Magnoliales, which also includes other families of flowering plants. The exact classification of Horsfieldia crassifolia can be further refined with more specific taxonomic information.

The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making it useful in the treatment of various ailments such as fever, cough, and digestive issues.
